text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, Curren Chan asks me to<n>accompany her
on a photo shoot. I<n>wait a bit at the spot where we
agreed to meet, until...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm here!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. Sorry for making you wait!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're so patient! Thanks! ♪ Okay,<n>let's get going!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I point the camera at Curren Chan,<n>who's
beaming from ear to ear, cute<n>as ever.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Thinking back...

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. I'm here to challenge you. I<n>might not be
anywhere near as<n>popular as you right now, but I
swear<n>I'll get more likes than you one day!

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait. I'll beat you using the<n>one thing I
have that you<n>don't—womanly charm.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Just like that. Focus your mind right<n>down to your
fingertips. Then<n>concentrate on your ears and tail.
Try<n>not to make any unnecessary<n>movements.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Gee willikers! You look splend'd,<n>Curren! Why,
you're so lov'ly, I've<n>fallen head ov'r heels for
ya!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now I've got womanly charm and the<n>means to
show it off! I knew City<n>was the right person to
ask! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure she's been doing her<n>best to
show everyone her womanly<n>charm, but...
choice_data_list:
Have you given up on looking for your womanly
charm?

Have you given up on looking for your womanly
charm?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Does it look that way to<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While I don't think she looks like<n>she's given up...
I find myself<n>struggling to answer when put on the
spot...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ...Hey. Whatever you do, don't<n>take your
eyes off me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Just as Curren Chan asks, I keep my<n>eyes
trained on her and keep<n>snapping photos. While
doing so, in a<n>brief and unexpected lapse between
smiles, I catch a faraway look in her<n>eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I've never seen an expression like<n>that on her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Those eyes, which had been focused<n>on the lens,
have been seemingly<n>drawn away by some other
force. I<n>find myself about to say something to<n>her,
when...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan looks back in my<n>direction and
flashes me a smirk.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. What's wrong? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me—is your heart aflutter<n>from seeing
me in a slightly different<n>light?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Really? You didn't feel anything?<n>Nothing at all?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Oh, my poor heart...
choice_data_list: Wait, m-my heart did skip a beat!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, I know. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You know, I thought of something. If I<n>changed
everything about myself... I<n>wouldn't be me
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My womanly charm and my cuteness<n>come as a
pair. I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If people can see my womanly charm<n>within my
usual cuteness, that's<n>good enough for me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Do you get what I mean? ...Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It sounds as if she's testing me, but<n>her smile is
innocent. I can only<n>manage a nod in reply.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I find out that the<n>photos we took
already have quite a<n>number of likes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but the college girl<n>apparently sent
her a DM saying, "I<n>noticed that new charm of
yours! But<n>I'm still gonna beat you!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I wish you'd be a little clearer... Or do<n>you mean
that I still have a ways to<n>go?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Looking good. I'd say you're just<n>about there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, City! Were you... watching<n>me, by any
chance?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I just happened to have a shoot<n>nearby. In any
case, it looks like<n>you've found your womanly
charm.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, so you picked up on it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Basically, Curren Chan is never going<n>to be about
womanly charm alone.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Cuteness is a part of who she is,<n>after all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! ♪ Without that, I wouldn't be me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But she's not only cute.Sometimes, a brief glimpse of anexpression or a gesture... something she doesn't usually show, shinesthrough.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: As far as Curren Chan is concerned,that is her womanly charm. ...Isn'tthat right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Right on the money! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm still getting the hang of it right<n>now, but I'm
going to polish my<n>womanly charm little by little
every<n>day from now on. You know why?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Cause I want everyone to be even<n>more head
over heels for me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan says this with her<n>trademark
adorable smile.
